zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Elizabeth Stewart於1372年11月7日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Robert III Stewart King of Scotland35歲，母親Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland22歲。她於1387年與Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年11月3日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Elizabeth Stewart于1372年11月7日出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Robert III Stewart King of Scotland35岁，母亲Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland22岁。她于1387年与Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年11月3日在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Elizabeth Stewart was born on 7 November 1372, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, was 35 and her mother, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, was 22. She married Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith in 1387. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 November 1411, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Elizabeth Stewart est née le 7 novembre 1372, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith en 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1411, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Elizabeth Stewart am 7. November 1372 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert III Stewart King of Scotland 35 und ihre Mutter Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland 22. Sie hat 1387 Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. November 1411 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Elizabeth Stewart è nata il il 7 novembre 1372 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith nel 1387. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 novembre 1411, nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Elizabeth Stewartが1372年11月7日にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Robert III Stewart King of Scotlandは35歳，母Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotlandは22歳であった。1387年にSir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年11月3日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Elizabeth Stewart(이)가 1372년 11월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1387년 Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 11월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.7 November 1372–3 November 1411: 7 de novembro de 1372–3 de novembro de 1411
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Elizabeth Stewart nasceu em 7 de novembro de 1372, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith em 1387. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1411, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Elizabeth Stewart родилась 7 ноября 1372 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert III Stewart King of Scotland было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith в 1387 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 ноября 1411 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.7 November 1372–3 November 1411: 7 de noviembre de 1372–3 de noviembre de 1411
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Elizabeth Stewart nació el 7 de noviembre de 1372, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith en 1387. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1411, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
